---
title: "Gallery"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: auto
---

## PhD Research
Featuring pictures of places I've traveled to during my PhD to conduct field work, complete research, or attend conferences or workshops. 

::: {layout="[[1, 1], [1, 1]]"}
![Virginia Institute of Marine Science](img/histologydrawer.jpeg){width=400}

![Northeastern Marine Science Center](img/nahantview.jpeg){width=400}

![North Carolina Oyster Reef](img/ncoysterreef.jpeg){width=400}

![Natural History Museum of New Mexico](img/nhmshells.jpeg){width=400}

:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1]]"}
![Tjarno Marine Lab, Sweden](img/tjarnostar.jpeg){width=400}

![Historic Preserved Oysters at VIMS](img/ffpeoysters.jpeg){width=400}

:::

::: {layout="[[1], [1], [1]]"}

![New Hampshire Oyster Reef](img/nhboat.jpeg){width=700}

![Gulf of Maine](img/maineboat.jpeg){width=700}

![Shoals Marine Lab](img/shoalssunset.JPG){width=700}

:::

## Travel


## Undergrad


## Home
